description: Persist per-session state from the Codex rollout and re-inject it on session start.

hooks.command: sh -c 'root="$PLUGIN_ROOT"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then root="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"; fi; [ -n "$root" ] || exit 0; exec node "$root/hooks/session-state-writer.js"'
sh -c 'root="$PLUGIN_ROOT"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then root="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"; fi; [ -n "$root" ] || exit 0; exec node "$root/hooks/session-state-injector.js"'
sh -c 'root="$PLUGIN_ROOT"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then root="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"; fi; [ -n "$root" ] || exit 0; exec node "$root/hooks/review-injector.js"'
